title: The reason Russia and China can't win at sea - Sarah Paine
summary: A video discussion between Dwarkesh Patel and Sarah Paine analyzing geopolitical and military factors affecting naval power in Russia and China. The content focuses on strategic analysis rather than artificial intelligence systems or techniques.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel talks with Sarah Paine about the geopolitical and military factors that constrain naval power for Russia and China. The discussion is strategic analysis of why both states struggle to prevail at sea, rather than a treatment of AI systems or techniques. The takeaway is a framework for understanding the structural limits on Russian and Chinese maritime strength.
